description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user is on the Browse Subscriptions page

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to a package tile
steps.result:
THEN the following statement should be spoken, "The <package_name> has a <tag_name> badge. The <package_name> package costs <$> per <period>. The package description reads <package_description>. Click to purchase or scroll to the right to hear information about other available packages."

**NOTE:** The "The <package_name> has a <tag_name> badge." statement is conditional on if a badge is applied to the package tile or not.
